creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Hi there

You can
  * use DISTVERSION instead of PORTVERSION (which gets derived from the first)
  * get rid of INSTALLS_ICONS, this is for GTK+ ports. 
  * uses USES=localbase instead of the ldflags.
  * I would sort the (non _build) components in USE_QT5= alphabetically.


mfg Tobias
